aleabitoreddit.recent_shift: 尽管近期市场因Meta算力传闻和CPO延迟报道出现抛售，但该账号认为基本面未变，并视回调为买入机会，对AI结构性需求保持高度信心。
representative_quotes: I personally think current market conditions are a reflection of liquidity and leverage, not individual fundamentals.
I expect AI names to recover since I see demand from compute to energy to memory to networking to be structural.
It's very rare to see such high conviction reiterated from Elon regarding humanoids both directionally and TAM-wise.

representative_quotes: Buying stocks with borrowed money hits levels seen at past market tops, per CNBC
The last time insider selling reached similar levels was during the dot-com bubble, which was followed by a significant market correction.
Goldman Sachs has said that the $5.3 trillion in AI spending by Meta, Microsoft, Amazon, and Alphabet through 2030 could put pressure on bond markets.

xiaomustock.recent_shift: 近期从对存储整体乐观转为侧重云厂和端侧AI，同时因杠杆亏损和回调更加重视仓位管理与基本面匹配
representative_quotes: 云厂是不管谁领先，它的生意都越来越大需求越来越旺，它都能吃到调配算力的溢价。
存储的量决定了他们能训练多少数据，因为音频数据的大小规模千倍万倍于文本图片。
对于顶尖的模型来的算力和内存一直紧缺，差生只是文具多才出租算力。
